case_title: OLIVER L HOLMES VS. YONG YAN TAN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,427.75 FILED BY HOLMES, OLIVER L AS TO DEFENDANT TAN, YONG YAN (OWNER OF DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ NOT STATED SERVED AUG-17-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAN, YONG YAN (OWNER OF DRIVER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---SAMUEL CHEW. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES, OLIVER L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAN, YONG YAN (OWNER OF DRIVER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
